parsed_test_cases.title: Battery Life Test Under Typical Use
steps: Start with a new set of four AA alkaline batteries
Continue testing until the low-battery icon is displayed
Count the total number of measurement cycles
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device displays the low-battery icon after approximately 300 measurement cycles

parsed_test_cases.title: Low-Battery Icon Display Test
steps: Start with a new set of four AA alkaline batteries
Perform measurements until the battery capacity falls below 15%
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The low-battery icon is displayed when the remaining battery capacity falls below 15%

parsed_test_cases.title: Battery Replacement Test
steps: Start with a set of batteries that have been drained to the point where the low-battery icon is displayed
Replace the batteries with a new set of four AA alkaline batteries
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The device functions normally and the low-battery icon is no longer displayed after replacing the batteries

parsed_test_cases.title: Measurement Cycle Count Test
steps: Start with a new set of four AA alkaline batteries
Perform a large number of measurements to drain the batteries
Count the total number of measurement cycles
Verify the device displays the low-battery icon
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The total number of measurement cycles is approximately 300 before the low-battery icon is displayed

parsed_test_cases.title: Battery Level Indicator Accuracy Test
steps: Start with a new set of four AA alkaline batteries
Perform measurements until the battery level falls below 15%
Compare the actual battery capacity with the displayed low-battery icon
parsed_test_cases.expected_result: The actual battery capacity is below 15% when the low-battery icon is displayed
